  - Name:    main

[Named Types]
  > type Logger
    - Defined In:      11_interfaces/src/main.go
    - TypeString:      main.Logger
    - Underlying:      interface{Log(message string) error}
    - Stringability:   0
    - Methods:
      - func (T) Log             func(string) error

  > type Service
    - Defined In:      11_interfaces/src/main.go
    - TypeString:      main.Service
    - Underlying:      interface{main.Logger; io.Closer}
    - Stringability:   0
    - Methods:
